title: FOIA US Army records  5/7  Korean War

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA US Army records  5/7  Korean War
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Ralph Puckett
Branch: United States Army
DOB: December 8, 1926
Dates of Service: Approx 1946 to 1968
Passed away 2024

Please provide the following military service information:
1. copy of Distinguished Service Cross award Citation
2. Section VII CURRENT AND PREVIOUS ASSIGNMENTS form
3. copy of Silver Star Medal award citations 
4. copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
5. copy of Medal of Honor award citation
6. Section II Military Education/ training courses
7. Purple heart awards
8. Air medal award citations

Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA  US Navy Records 5/7
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Terry Bryant
Branch: United States Navy
DOB: Dec 1, 1942
Dates of Service: Approx 1961 to 1981

Request following documents:
1) copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
2) History of Assignments NAVPERS form 601-5
3) Navy commendation medal award citations
4) Presidential Unit citation award citation

Historical Documentation
Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6)
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.

Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley
